summary: Full AuthManager implementation with proper abstractions for testability. All TDD anchors covered by 38 unit tests. Clean separation of concerns via BiometricChecker, PasswordHasher, TimeProvider interfaces.

findings.finding: authenticateWithPassword reads failure count, increments, and writes back non-atomically. Concurrent calls could race.
findings.recommendation: Acceptable for single-UI-thread mobile app. If AuthManager is ever called from background threads, add @Synchronized or AtomicInteger.
findings.reason: Mobile UI is single-threaded. Method is called from ViewModel on main thread.

findings.finding: Comment 'Keep lockout level -- it only resets on successful auth' contradicts the next line which sets lockoutLevel to 0.
LOCKOUT_DURATIONS_MS is val (not const) due to longArrayOf() limitation. Kotlin const only supports primitives and String.
createForTesting changed from internal to public. Annotated with @VisibleForTesting.
findings.reason: Required for cross-module test access. @VisibleForTesting annotation clearly marks intent.
